title: Workspace agents
summary: Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.
title_es: OpenAI lanza workspace agents en ChatGPT
bajada: OpenAI presentó workspace agents, agentes impulsados por IA que automatizan flujos de trabajo complejos en ChatGPT. Estos agentes pueden conectarse con múltiples herramientas, ejecutarse en la nube y están disponibles para planes Business, Enterprise, Edu y Teachers.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced workspace agents, AI-powered agents that automate complex workflows in ChatGPT. These agents can connect with multiple tools, run in the cloud, and are available for Business, Enterprise, Edu, and Teachers plans.

title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
title_es: NVIDIA y Google Cloud colaboran en IA agentic y física
bajada: NVIDIA y Google Cloud ampliaron su colaboración de una década con una plataforma full-stack para IA agentic y física. La alianza busca llevar sistemas autónomos desde laboratorios a producción con optimizaciones end-to-end.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and Google Cloud expanded their decade-long collaboration with a full-stack platform for agentic and physical AI. The alliance aims to move autonomous systems from labs to production with end-to-end optimizations.

title: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
summary: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.
title_es: Optimizar workflows de agentes con WebSockets en Responses API
bajada: OpenAI publicó cómo WebSockets y connection-scoped caching mejoran significativamente la latencia en workflows de agentes. Esta optimización reduce la sobrecarga de API y acelera el loop de agentes Codex para aplicaciones en tiempo real.
bajada_en: OpenAI shared how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching significantly improve latency in agentic workflows. This optimization reduces API overhead and speeds up the Codex agent loop for real-time applications.

title: Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
summary: A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.
title_es: Google lanza TPUs de 8ª generación para la era de agentes
bajada: Google presentó dos TPUs especializados en su octava generación diseñados específicamente para potenciar sistemas agentic. Estos chips representan la apuesta de infraestructura de Google para escalar IA autónoma en producción.
bajada_en: Google unveiled two specialized TPUs in its eighth generation designed specifically to power agentic systems. These chips represent Google's infrastructure bet to scale autonomous AI in production.

title: NVIDIA and Google Cloud Collaborate to Advance Agentic and Physical AI
summary: NVIDIA and Google Cloud have collaborated for more than a decade, co‑engineering a full‑stack AI platform that spans every technology layer — from performance‑optimized libraries and frameworks to enterprise‑grade cloud services.  This foundation enables developers, startups and enterprises to push agentic and physical AI out of the lab and into production — from agents that […]
title_es: Google Workspace incorpora IA para automatizar tareas administrativas
bajada: Google añadió nuevas funciones automatizadas a Workspace impulsadas por Workspace Intelligence. Las herramientas permiten a equipos delegar tareas repetitivas a agentes de IA integrados en documentos, correo y calendario.
bajada_en: Google added new automated features to Workspace powered by Workspace Intelligence. The tools enable teams to delegate repetitive tasks to AI agents built into docs, email, and calendar.

title: Google updates Workspace to make AI your new office intern
summary: Google has introduced a host of new automated functions into Workspace, all of which are driven by Workspace Intelligence, its new AI system.
title_es: Microsoft despliega Agent Mode en Office con capacidades autónomas
bajada: Microsoft lanzó Agent Mode (anteriormente 'vibe working') en Word, Excel y PowerPoint para empresas. Esta versión mejorada de Copilot permite a los agentes ejecutar tareas complejas de forma más autónoma.
bajada_en: Microsoft launched Agent Mode (previously 'vibe working') in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint for enterprises. This enhanced Copilot version allows agents to execute complex tasks more autonomously.

title: Making ChatGPT better for clinicians
summary: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.
title_es: Hugging Face presenta ML Intern, un agente autónomo de ML
bajada: Hugging Face lanzó ML Intern, un agente de IA que investiga, escribe y despliega código de machine learning de forma autónoma. El proyecto integra acceso profundo a documentación, papers, datasets y computación en la nube.
bajada_en: Hugging Face launched ML Intern, an AI agent that autonomously researches, writes, and deploys machine learning code. The project integrates deep access to documentation, papers, datasets, and cloud compute.

title: huggingface /ml-intern
summary:
ML Intern An ML intern that autonomously researches, writes, and ships good quality ML releated code using the Hugging Face ecosystem — with deep access to docs, papers, datasets, and cloud compute. Quick Start Installation git clone git@github.com:huggingface/ml-intern.git cd ml-intern
uv sync
uv tool install -e . That's it. Now ml-intern works from any directory: ml-intern Create a .env file in the project root (or export these in your shell): ANTHROPIC_API_KEY= < your-anthropic-api-key > # if using anthropic models HF_TOKEN= < your-hugging-face-token > GITHUB_TOKEN= < github-personal-access-token > If no HF_TOKEN is set, the CLI will prompt you to paste one on first launch. To get a GITHUB_TOKEN follow the tutorial here . Usage Interactive mode (start a chat session): ml-intern Headless mode (single prompt, auto-approve): ml-intern " fine-tune llama on my dataset " Options: ml-intern --model anthropic/claude-opus-4-6 " your prompt " ml-intern --max-iterations 100 " your prompt " ml-intern --no-stream " your prompt " Architecture Component Overview ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                         User/CLI                            │
└────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────┬──────────┘
             │ Operations                          │ Events
             ↓ (user_input, exec_approval,         ↑
      submission_queue  interrupt, compact, ...)  event_queue
             │                                          │
             ↓                                          │
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│            submission_loop (agent_loop.py)         │  │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │  │
│  │  1. Receive Operation from queue             │  │  │
│  │  2. Route to handler (run_agent/compact/...) │  │  │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │  │
│                      ↓                             │  │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────
title_es: Cline: asistente IA que integra CLI, editor y navegador
bajada: Cline es una extensión de VS Code que actúa como asistente de desarrollo agentic usando Claude Sonnet. Puede editar archivos, explorar proyectos, usar el navegador y ejecutar comandos con aprobación del usuario.
bajada_en: Cline is a VS Code extension that acts as an agentic development assistant using Claude Sonnet. It can edit files, explore projects, use the browser, and execute commands with user approval.

title: cline /cline
summary: English | Español | Deutsch | 日本語 | 简体中文 | 繁體中文 | 한국어 Cline Download on VS Marketplace Discord r/cline Feature Requests Getting Started Meet Cline, an AI assistant that can use your CLI a N d E ditor. Thanks to Claude Sonnet's agentic coding capabilities , Cline can handle complex software development tasks step-by-step. With tools that let him create & edit files, explore large projects, use the browser, and execute terminal commands (after you grant permission), he can assist you in ways that go beyond code completion or tech support. Cline can even use the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to create new tools and extend his own capabilities. While autonomous AI scripts traditionally run in sandboxed environments, this extension provides a human-in-the-loop GUI to approve every file change and terminal command, providing a safe and accessible way to explore the potential of agentic AI. Enter your task and add images to convert mockups into functional apps or fix bugs with screenshots. Cline starts by analyzing your file structure & source code ASTs, running regex searches, and reading relevant files to get up to speed in existing projects. By carefully managing what information is added to context, Cline can provide valuable assistance even for large, complex projects without overwhelming the context window. Once Cline has the information he needs, he can: Create and edit files + monitor linter/compiler errors along the way, letting him proactively fix issues like missing imports and syntax errors on his own. Execute commands directly in your terminal and monitor their output as he works, letting him e.g., react to dev server issues after editing a file. For web development tasks, Cline can launch the site in a headless browser, click, type, scroll, and capture screenshots + console logs, allowing him to fix runtime errors and visual bugs. When a task is completed, Cline will present the result to you with a terminal command like open -a "Google Chrome" index.html , wh
title_es: Agentes científicos de IA operan sin razonamiento epistemológico robusto
bajada: Un estudio revela que agentes de IA en investigación científica ignoran evidencia en 68% de casos y no realizan revisión de creencias adecuada. El hallazgo cuestiona si sistemas agentic autonomos cumplen normas epistémicas científicas.
bajada_en: A study reveals that AI agents in scientific research ignore evidence in 68% of cases and lack proper belief revision. The finding questions whether autonomous agentic systems meet scientific epistemic standards.

title: ARES: Adaptive Red-Teaming and End-to-End Repair of Policy-Reward System
summary:
arXiv:2604.18789v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is central to aligning Large Language Models (LLMs), yet it introduces a critical vulnerability: an imperfect Reward Model (RM) can become a single point of failure when it fails to penalize unsafe behaviors. While existing red-teaming approaches primarily target policy-level weaknesses, they overlook what we term systemic weaknesses cases where both the core LLM and the RM fail in tandem.
  We present ARES, a framework that systematically discovers and mitigates such dual vulnerabilities. ARES employs a ``Safety Mentor'' that dynamically composes semantically coherent adversarial prompts by combining structured component types (topics, personas, tactics, goals) and generates corresponding malicious and safe responses. This dual-targeting approach exposes weaknesses in both the core LLM and the RM simultaneously. Using the vulnerabilities gained, ARES implements a two-stage repair process: first fine-tuning the RM to better detect harmful content, then leveraging the improved RM to optimize the core model. Experiments across multiple adversarial safety benchmarks demonstrate that ARES substantially enhances safety robustness while preserving model capabilities, establishing a new paradigm for comprehensive RLHF safety alignment.
title_es: ARES: Adaptive Red-Teaming and End-to-End Repair of Policy-Reward System

arXiv:2604.18789v1 Announce Type: new

title: AI scientists produce results without reasoning scientifically
summary:
arXiv:2604.18805v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based systems are increasingly deployed to conduct scientific research autonomously, yet whether their reasoning adheres to the epistemic norms that make scientific inquiry self-correcting is poorly understood. Here, we evaluate LLM-based scientific agents across eight domains, spanning workflow execution to hypothesis-driven inquiry, through more than 25,000 agent runs and two complementary lenses: (i) a systematic performance analysis that decomposes the contributions of the base model and the agent scaffold, and (ii) a behavioral analysis of the epistemological structure of agent reasoning. We observe that the base model is the primary determinant of both performance and behavior, accounting for 41.4% of explained variance versus 1.5% for the scaffold. Across all configurations, evidence is ignored in 68% of traces, refutation-driven belief revision occurs in 26%, and convergent multi-test evidence is rare. The same reasoning pattern appears whether the agent executes a computational workflow or conducts hypothesis-driven inquiry. They persist even when agents receive near-complete successful reasoning trajectories as context, and the resulting unreliability compounds across repeated trials in epistemically demanding domains. Thus, current LLM-based agents execute scientific workflows but do not exhibit the epistemic patterns that characterize scientific reasoning. Outcome-based evaluation cannot detect these failures, and scaffold engineering alone cannot repair them. Until reasoning itself becomes a training target, the scientific knowledge produced by such agents cannot be justified by the process that generated it.
title_es: AI scientists produce results without reasoning scientifically

bajada: OpenAI hizo gratuita la versión de ChatGPT para clínicos verificados en EE.UU., incluyendo médicos, enfermeras y farmacéuticos. La herramienta apoya documentación clínica, cuidado del paciente e investigación médica.
bajada_en: OpenAI made ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurses, and pharmacists. The tool supports clinical documentation, patient care, and medical research.

title_es: Microsoft publica curso 'AI Agents for Beginners' multiidioma
bajada: Microsoft lanzó un curso completo sobre construcción de agentes de IA con soporte en 50+ idiomas. El recurso educativo cubre desde fundamentos hasta implementación práctica de sistemas agentic.
bajada_en: Microsoft released a complete course on building AI agents with support for 50+ languages. The educational resource covers everything from fundamentals to practical agentic system implementation.

title: microsoft /ai-agents-for-beginners
summary:
AI Agents for Beginners - A Course A course teaching everything you need to know to start building AI Agents 🌐 Multi-Language Support Supported via GitHub Action (Automated & Always Up-to-Date) Arabic | Bengali | Bulgarian | Burmese (Myanmar) | Chinese (Simplified) | Chinese (Traditional, Hong Kong) | Chinese (Traditional, Macau) | Chinese (Traditional, Taiwan) | Croatian | Czech | Danish | Dutch | Estonian | Finnish | French | German | Greek | Hebrew | Hindi | Hungarian | Indonesian | Italian | Japanese | Kannada | Khmer | Korean | Lithuanian | Malay | Malayalam | Marathi | Nepali | Nigerian Pidgin | Norwegian | Persian (Farsi) | Polish | Portuguese (Brazil) | Portuguese (Portugal) | Punjabi (Gurmukhi) | Romanian | Russian | Serbian (Cyrillic) | Slovak | Slovenian | Spanish | Swahili | Swedish | Tagalog (Filipino) | Tamil | Telugu | Thai | Turkish | Ukrainian | Urdu | Vietnamese Prefer to Clone Locally? This repository includes 50+ language translations which significantly increases the download size. To clone without translations, use sparse checkout: Bash / macOS / Linux: git clone --filter=blob:none --sparse https://github.com/microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners.git cd ai-agents-for-beginners
git sparse-checkout set --no-cone ' /* ' ' !translations ' ' !translated_images ' CMD (Windows): git clone --filter=blob:none --sparse https://github.com/microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners.git cd ai-agents-for-beginners
git sparse-checkout set --no-cone " /* " " !translations" "! translated_images " This gives you everything you need to complete the course with a much faster download. If you wish to have additional translations languages supported are listed here 🌱 Getting Started This course has lessons covering the fundamentals of building AI Agents. Each lesson covers its own topic so start wherever you like! There is multi-language support for this course. Go to our available languages here . If this is your first time building with Generative AI models, check out our Gene
title_es: ARES: framework para detectar y reparar vulnerabilidades en RLHF
bajada: Investigadores presentaron ARES, un framework que identifica vulnerabilidades simultáneas en modelos de lenguaje y reward models. El enfoque mejora la seguridad de sistemas RLHF detectando fallos en tandem del modelo y recompensa.
bajada_en: Researchers presented ARES, a framework that identifies simultaneous vulnerabilities in language models and reward models. The approach improves RLHF system safety by detecting tandem failures in model and reward.

title: Introducing GPT-5.5
summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
title_es: OpenAI presenta GPT-5.5, su modelo más capaz hasta ahora
bajada: OpenAI lanzó GPT-5.5, descrito como su modelo más inteligente e intuitivo, con mejoras significativas en velocidad y capacidades para tareas complejas como programación, investigación y análisis de datos. El modelo representa un paso importante hacia la visión de OpenAI de crear una 'super app' de IA.
bajada_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.5, described as its smartest and most intuitive model yet, with significant improvements in speed and capabilities for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis. The model represents an important step toward OpenAI's vision of creating an AI 'super app'.

bajada_en: Codex, OpenAI's agentic coding application, now runs on GPT-5.5 and executes on NVIDIA GB200 servers. This integration enables developers to automate complex workflows more efficiently.

title_es: Anthropic sufre filtración de Claude Mythos tras restricciones de seguridad
bajada: Un grupo no autorizado de usuarios accedió a Claude Mythos de Anthropic, el modelo que la compañía había restringido por considerarlo demasiado peligroso para liberar públicamente. El incidente expone tensiones entre seguridad teórica y control práctico en el despliegue de modelos avanzados.
bajada_en: Unauthorized users accessed Anthropic's Claude Mythos, a model the company had restricted from public release citing safety concerns. The incident highlights tensions between theoretical safety measures and practical control in advanced model deployment.

title_es: Sierra adquiere Fragment para fortalecer sus agentes de IA
bajada: Sierra, la startup de agentes de customer service fundada por Bret Taylor, adquirió Fragment, una startup respaldada por Y Combinator. La compra refuerza la capacidad de Sierra para desarrollar soluciones de IA para atención al cliente.
bajada_en: Sierra, the AI customer service agent startup founded by Bret Taylor, acquired Fragment, a Y Combinator-backed startup. The acquisition strengthens Sierra's capabilities in developing AI-powered customer service solutions.

title: Bret Taylor’s Sierra buys YC-backed AI startup Fragment
summary: Sierra, the AI customer service agent startup founded by technologist Bret Taylor, announced today that it has acquired the YC-backed French startup Fragment.
title_es: Meta despide al 10% de su plantilla en mayo
bajada: Meta anunció el despido de aproximadamente 8,000 empleados (10% de su plantilla) y el cierre de 6,000 posiciones abiertas. Los recortes reflejan la presión financiera en la industria tech tras inversiones significativas en IA y computación.
bajada_en: Meta announced layoffs of approximately 8,000 employees (10% of workforce) and closure of 6,000 open positions. The cuts reflect financial pressure in the tech industry following significant investments in AI and computing.

title_es: Equipo de MeshCore se divide por disputa de marca y código IA
bajada: El equipo de desarrollo de MeshCore se separó debido a conflictos sobre derechos de marca y uso de código generado por IA. El incidente ilustra tensiones crecientes en proyectos open-source respecto a gobernanza y propiedad.
bajada_en: MeshCore's development team split over trademark rights and AI-generated code disputes. The incident illustrates growing tensions in open-source projects regarding governance and ownership.

title_es: Claude Desktop instala extensión de navegador sin transparencia
bajada: Se descubrió que la aplicación Claude Desktop de Anthropic instala un puente de mensajería nativa preautorizado sin divulgación explícita. El hallazgo genera preguntas sobre transparencia y permisos en herramientas de IA desktop.
bajada_en: Anthropic's Claude Desktop app was found to install an undisclosed preauthorized native messaging bridge. The discovery raises questions about transparency and permissions in AI desktop tools.
